payload.answer: The new memory may supersede the existing memory: the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new memory as replacing the old current-employment fact; keep_both if both should remain because the situation is ambiguous or may refer to different Sams; reject_new if the new memory is not reliable; edit if you want to clarify wording, timing, or identity before saving.
